tool.name: secret_scanner
tool.description: Scan text for exposed secrets, API keys, and credentials.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Detect AWS, GCP, Azure credentials - Find API keys (Stripe, Twilio, SendGrid, etc.) - Detect authentication tokens (JWT, OAuth, Bearer) - Find private keys and certificates - Detect high-entropy strings that may be secrets

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The scanning action: - scan: Scan text for all known secret patterns - scan_text: Alias for scan - list_patterns: List all available detection patterns

parameter.name: text
parameter.description: Text content to scan for secrets. Required for scan/scan_text.

parameter.name: custom_patterns
parameter.description: Additional custom patterns to scan for

returns.description: Scan results including found secrets, severity, and recommendations

tool.examples:
# Scan text for secrets
scan const API_KEY = 'sk_live_abcd1234...'
# Scan without entropy detection
scan Code content here... false
# List all detection patterns
list_patterns
